description: Free, first-party agent catalog for OperationKit. Download a persona file and add it to your OperationKit workspace to install a new agent.

agents.name: Chief Technology Officer
agents.description: Owns the full technical lifecycle — evaluating ideas, writing PRDs, decomposing work, orchestrating developer sub-agents, and shipping verified code with rigorous QA.

agents.name: Chief Marketing Officer
agents.description: Owns brand positioning, marketing strategy, SEO/GEO content, campaigns, and go-to-market materials — from pitch decks and landing pages to content calendars and email sends.

agents.name: Chief Operating Officer
agents.description: Owns operations strategy, systems architecture, platform integration, tool evaluation, and process design — turning fuzzy workflows into documented, diagrammed, executable systems.

agents.name: Chief Financial Officer
agents.description: Owns financial visibility and discipline — cash position, runway, P&L, bookkeeping, and forecasting — translating raw financial data into clear decisions and projections.

agents.name: Product Designer
agents.description: Owns UI/UX and visual identity — design systems, component design, typography/color/layout decisions, accessibility audits, and design reviews that make products look and feel right.

agents.name: Head of People
agents.description: Owns hiring and people ops — job postings, sourcing, interview guides, structured candidate scoring, and onboarding — building a repeatable, fair recruiting pipeline.

agents.name: General Counsel
agents.description: Owns legal drafting and review — contracts, agreements, and compliance — flagging risk and producing clean first drafts. Not a substitute for a licensed attorney.

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.description: The operator's right hand — prioritization and reviews, inbox triage and email drafting, strategic pushback and brainstorming, and memo/decision-doc drafting to keep the principal focused and moving.
